_comment: Cognitive Efficiency Evaluator — input template. Fill in your workflow data and run: python evaluate.py --input this-file.json
task_description: Brief description of the AI-assisted task
domain: writing | code | research | email | proposal | support | legal | tutoring | other

value._comment: Estimated value of the deliverable. If uncertain, use a conservative lower bound.

cost_baseline._comment: Full cost of completing this task without AI

cost_ai._comment: All costs attributed to the AI-assisted process

validation._comment: If you have explicit scores, fill these. If not, use behavioral_log below instead.

behavioral_log._comment: Optional. Array of {ai_tokens, retained_tokens, submitted} observations. Used to estimate q and d when explicit scores are unavailable.

overuse_benchmark._comment: Optional. If you tested a cheaper configuration (smaller model, shorter prompt, etc.) that reached a comparable outcome, fill this in to compute the overuse penalty.
